name: Timely AI Time Tracking API
what_it_does: AI-powered automatic time tracking platform with REST API — using Memory AI to automatically log time from calendar, apps, and meetings without manual input, with project budget tracking and team capacity reporting for knowledge workers and agencies.
use_cases: Querying automatically tracked time entries for billable hour calculations
Syncing Timely project data to invoicing systems for client billing
Monitoring team logged hours vs project budgets via reporting API
Exporting time data to payroll or ERP systems via API integration
Building custom dashboards on team utilization from Timely API
not_for: Hourly shift worker time clocking (use Deputy or When I Work)
Manual-only time tracking without AI assistance (use Clockify)
Complex payroll integration with compliance requirements
best_when: Knowledge workers or agencies want automatic time tracking (no manual entry) with AI assistance, project budgets, and API access for billing system integration.
avoid_when: You need manual time entry control, shift scheduling, or the AI automatic tracking model doesn't fit your workflow.

auth.notes: OAuth2 Authorization Code flow for third-party apps. Personal Access Tokens for direct API use. Scoped access for read/write. Account ID required in API URL paths. Token expiry with refresh token flow.

pricing.paid_tiers: Starter from $9/user/month; Premium from $16/user/month; Unlimited from $22/user/month
pricing.notes: No free tier. Norwegian company (Oslo). Per-user pricing. API access on Premium+ plans. Memory AI (automatic tracking) is the key differentiator. Backed by Insight Partners. Used by agencies, consultancies, law firms.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits apply; not publicly documented

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for events, projects, users, clients, and reports. OAuth2 with scopes for integrations. No webhooks — polling required. Account ID in URL paths. Automatic tracking data may have 'suggested' vs 'logged' distinction — important for billing accuracy.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Time event creation not idempotent. Project management idempotent by ID. Read operations idempotent. Suggested vs logged status distinction creates complexity.
known_agent_gotchas: Account ID required in all API URL paths — format: /1.0/{account_id}/...
Suggested vs logged time distinction — only logged time is billable
No webhooks — must poll for new time entries
API access requires Premium plan or higher

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant. Norwegian company — strong EU privacy culture. OAuth2 with scopes. EU/US data residency. Standard SaaS security. Memory AI processes behavioral data — privacy considerations for automatic tracking.
